discovery.name: ITEM_MASTER_REFS
discovery.sql: SELECT p.ORGANIZATION_CODE AS ORG, (SELECT MIN(ic.ITEM_CLASS_NAME) FROM EGP_ITEM_CLASSES_VL ic WHERE ic.ITEM_CLASS_NAME = 'Root Item Class') AS ICLASS, (SELECT b.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE FROM EGP_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B b JOIN INV_ORG_PARAMETERS p2 ON p2.ORGANIZATION_ID = b.ORGANIZATION_ID WHERE p2.ORGANIZATION_CODE = p.ORGANIZATION_CODE AND b.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE = 'Active' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS STATUS, (SELECT u.UNIT_OF_MEASURE FROM INV_UNITS_OF_MEASURE_VL u WHERE u.UOM_CODE = 'ECH') AS UOM FROM INV_ORG_PARAMETERS p WHERE p.MASTER_ORGANIZATION_ID = p.ORGANIZATION_ID AND p.ORGANIZATION_CODE = '000'

verify.bad_absence_note: Item Import rejected the bad row with 'You must provide a valid value for the attribute organization' (invalid ORGANIZATION_CODE ZZ_NO_SUCH_ORG) -- captured live in the ItemImportJobDef ESS report (PROCESS_STATUS=3 in EGP_SYSTEM_ITEMS_INTERFACE before purge). Item Import purges the errored interface row after the batch completes, so the authoritative BAD proof is ABSENCE from base EGP_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B while the two good rows from the SAME load reached base with real INVENTORY_ITEM_IDs.

base_read.sql: SELECT b.ITEM_NUMBER AS ITEM_NUMBER, b.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, p.ORGANIZATION_CODE AS ORG FROM EGP_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B b JOIN INV_ORG_PARAMETERS p ON p.ORGANIZATION_ID = b.ORGANIZATION_ID WHERE b.ITEM_NUMBER LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-ITEM-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT i.ITEM_NUMBER AS ITEM_NUMBER, i.ORGANIZATION_CODE AS ORG, ('PROCESS_STATUS=' || TO_CHAR(i.PROCESS_STATUS) || ' (organization ' || i.ORGANIZATION_CODE || ' invalid - You must provide a valid value for the attribute organization; rejected by Item Import, never created in EGP_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B)') AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM EGP_SYSTEM_ITEMS_INTERFACE i WHERE i.LOAD_REQUEST_ID = :LRID AND i.ITEM_NUMBER LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-ITEM-%'
